lead.description: The Small Business Advisory Firm (SBAF) was established with the mission of making it easier to do business with the federal government for small to mid-size companies. The government contracting market is worth nearly $100 billion in sales to small businesses each year. The challenge for these businesses is that selling to the federal government is quite different from selling to the commercial sector.
